positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial forest landscape print. The scene features towering, fractalized trees with glowing bioluminescent foliage and crystal riverbeds reflecting the light. Incorporate geometric patterns (Art Deco, sacred geometry) into the roots and crystalline formations. Style: Highly detailed woodblock print aesthetic mixed with glowing cosmic fantasy, clean vector lines, and strong, saturated color contrast. Composition: Central subject, perfect symmetry, suitable for repeating patterns on apparel. Lighting: High contrast, deep shadows offset by vibrant emerald green, sapphire blue, and gold glowing highlights. Color palette: Indigo, deep teal, electric blue, and glowing gold accents. Focus on clean silhouettes and graphic impact.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, low detail, messy, cluttered, photographic
